text: Standing in this space, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The glass walls create a barrier and a view into something designed for exploration and innovation—the R+D exhibit beckons me forward. The phrase "how humans design, connect and coexist with intelligent machines" echoes in my mind, inviting me to reflect on my own relationship with technology. I feel small yet part of a larger conversation, drawn by both wonder and a subtle unease about the rapid pace of change all around me.
